name: CRUD/all-resource-types
description: Creates and reads every concrete FHIR resource type present in all four schemas (STU3, R4, R4B, R5) — the normative core, excluding conformance/meta resources (Bundle, CapabilityStatement, CompartmentDefinition, GraphDefinition, ImplementationGuide, MessageDefinition, OperationDefinition, Parameters, SearchParameter, StructureDefinition, TerminologyCapabilities, TestReport, TestScript) that most servers do not accept generic create/read for. Version-specific resource types (added/removed across versions) live in the sibling CRUD/all-resource-types-*.json suites, each gated on the target fhirVersion so a mismatched target never attempts fixture resolution for a resource type its version does not support. Each test is additionally gated by CapabilityStatement create/read interactions so unsupported resource types are skipped rather than failed.

test.name: Can create and read Account
test.description: When the target server declares Account create and read interactions, POST /Account must create a synthetic Account and GET /Account/{id} must read it back.

operation.description: POST a synthetic Account

assert.description: Account create must return HTTP 201 Created
Create response body must be a Account
Server must assign an id

operation.description: GET the created Account by server-assigned id

assert.description: Account read must return HTTP 200 OK
Read response body must be a Account
Read id must match the created id
